standard.overall: Elegant, slender cat with a distinct silvery-blue double coat and emerald eyes.
standard.head: Smooth, medium wedge with flat co-planes. Distinctive 'smile'.
standard.eyes: Vivid green, set wide apart, almond-shaped.
standard.ears: Large, wide at base, set far apart and upright.
standard.coat: Short, dense, very soft double coat standing away from body.
standard.personality: Quiet, sensitive, and devoted to owners.

standard.overall: Large, sturdy cat with a long, bushy tail and a waterproof double coat.
standard.head: Equilateral triangle shape with a straight profile from brow to nose tip.
standard.ears: Medium to large, rounded tips, heavily furnished inside. Lynx tips preferred.
standard.body: Solidly muscular and well-balanced with substantial bone.
standard.coat: Waterproof double coat with dense undercoat and long guard hairs.

standard.overall: The 'Sacred Cat of Burma', known for its white gloves and blue eyes.
standard.head: Strong, broad and rounded with a 'Roman' nose (slight Roman bump).
standard.ears: Medium size, rounded tips, set wide apart.
standard.coat: Long, silky with a heavy ruff around the neck. Low undercoat.

standard.overall: A sleek, svelte cat with a wide range of colors and patterns.
standard.head: Long tapering wedge, creating a perfect triangle with large ears.
standard.eyes: Almond-shaped, slanted toward the nose. Usually green.
standard.ears: Strikingly large, pointed, wide at base.
standard.coat: Very short, fine, glossy, and close-lying.

standard.overall: Distinguished by its curly coat and arched 'greyhound' back.
standard.head: Small, egg-shaped with high cheekbones.
standard.eyes: Medium to large ovals, slanted slightly upward.
standard.body: Small to medium, arched back with a tucked-up waist.
standard.coat: Short, fine, and curly (Marcel wave) without guard hairs.
standard.personality: Intelligent, active, and playful like a kitten.

standard.overall: A compact, heavily muscled cat often described as a 'brick wrapped in silk'.
standard.head: Rounded with no flat planes. Short, well-developed muzzle.
standard.eyes: Large, round, set wide apart. Gold or yellow.
standard.ears: Medium size, rounded tips, tilted slightly forward.
standard.body: Medium size, substantial bone, surprisingly heavy for size.

standard.overall: A powerful, forest cat with a thick triple coat and a sweet expression.
standard.head: Modified wedge with rounded contours. Full muzzle.
standard.eyes: Medium to large, almost round, slightly slanted.
standard.ears: Medium-large, rounded tips with heavy furnishings.
standard.coat: Dense triple coat, waterproof, with a rich ruff.

standard.overall: A balanced midpoint between the Siamese and Burmese types.
standard.head: Modified rounded wedge with a blunt muzzle.
standard.eyes: Open almond shape, aquamarine or blue-green.
standard.ears: Medium size, oval tips, wide at base.
standard.body: Medium length, well-muscled and surprisingly heavy.
standard.coat: Short to medium-short, soft and silky with a luster.
